message:
test(migration,registry): add hash-divergence fail-closed test and expand registry integrity verification

Schema migration (bd-2fqyv.6.2):
- New test: intermediate_version_with_prefix_journal_but_hash_divergence_fails_closed
  Applies a prefix plan (v1.0.0→v1.1.0), then tampers with canonical_state
  and refreshes the state hash. Verifies that executing the full plan
  (v1.0.0→v2.0.0) correctly rejects with MIGRATION_STATE_CONFLICT because
  the journal suffix checksum no longer matches the tampered state hash,
  even though the journal entries structurally match the plan prefix.

Registry CLI E2E:
- Expand registry_publish_persists_artifact_and_search_reports_integrity:
  verify manifest artifact_sha256 matches actual SHA-256 of stored artifact,
  then run `registry verify` CLI and assert integrity=verified output
- New test: registry_search_reports_invalid_signature_for_tampered_manifest
  publishes an extension, tampers the manifest signature, then verifies
  `registry search` reports invalid-signature status for that extension

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
